title: Campaign Monitor vs Customer.io (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Campaign Monitor vs Customer.io: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Customer.io: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Campaign Monitor and Customer.io comes down to your specific use case. Campaign Monitor is built for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Customer.io targets product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

comparison_table.tool_a: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands
comparison_table.tool_b: Product And Growth Teams Sending Behaviour-Triggered Messages

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Customer.io?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Campaign Monitor wins for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Customer.io is stronger for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Customer.io?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Customer.io to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
